title: Zomato Restaurant Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Zomato Restaurant Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Restaurant Partners are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners:
Zomato Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners!
